title: Easy Rolling Toy Box
summary: Hide your kids clutter with this easy to build Rolling Toy Box.
description: Hide your kids clutter with this easy to build Rolling Toy Box. The perfect addition to any kids room!

steps.title: Make Your Cuts
steps.body: Make your cuts from your 4'x4' plywood sheet using the cut diagram and the new Accu-Cut Circular Saw Guide Track System eliminating the need for a table saw.

steps.title: Create Pocket Holes
steps.body: Drill 3/4" Pocket Holes in the bottom of both the front and back panels (24" x 15").

steps.title: Create Pocket Holes
steps.body: Drill 3/4" Pocket Holes in both side panels (15" x 13 1/2").

steps.title: Attach Front and Back Panels
steps.body: Attach the front and back panels (24" x 15") to the bottom panel (24" x 15") using 1 1/4" Pocket Hole Screws and wood glue.

steps.title: Attach Side Panels
steps.body: Attach the side panels (15" x 13 1/2") to the bottom (24" x 15") using 1 1/4" Pocket Hole Screws and wood glue.

steps.title: Attach Wheels
steps.body: Attach wheels to the bottom of the toy box using 5/8" wood screws.
